Coalition.summary: Per Liberal Party platform: the Coalition's 'Australian Values Migration Plan' proposes reducing migration numbers, making compliance with the Australian Values Statement a binding visa condition (with breaches as grounds for visa cancellation and deportation), introducing a 'Safe Country List' to fast-track rejection of unfounded protection claims, restoring Temporary Protection Visas, and strengthening security and social-media screening of visa applicants.

sources.title: Coalition launches first wave of Australian values migration plan

Labor.summary: Per Australian Labor Party platform: Labor champions multiculturalism as 'a cornerstone of Australian values and social cohesion,' favours permanent over temporary migration, and (per its 2026-27 program) caps permanent migration at 185,000 places while aiming to reduce net overseas migration to around 225,000.

sources.title: How One Nation, Labor, the Coalition, and the Greens compare on migration policy
